title: Income Tax Department Clarifies ITR Filing, Tax Audit, and New Act Transition (May 25, 2026)
content:
# Income Tax Department Clarifies ITR Filing, Tax Audit, and New Act Transition (May 25, 2026)

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department ne income tax return filing, tax audit reports, aur Income Tax Act, 2025 ke transition se related various aspects par fresh clarifications announce kiye hain. Ye clarifications Chartered Accountants ke liye bahut crucial hain.

Here are the key takeaways:

*   **Belated Returns for AY 2026-27:** Old Act ke under, Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke liye belated returns file karne ki last date December 31, 2026 hai.
*   **Revised/Belated Returns for AY 2025-26 or Earlier:** AY 2025-26 ya usse pehle ke assessment years ke liye revised ya belated returns April 1, 2026 ke baad file nahi kiye ja sakte.
*   **Updated Returns (ITR-U):** Lekin, AY 2025-26 ya usse pehle ke saalon ke liye, updated return (ITR-U) ab bhi old Act ke Section 139(8A) ke according file kiya ja sakta hai.
*   **AY 2026-27 vs. Tax Year 2026-27:**
    *   **AY 2026-27 (income of FY 2025-26):** Returns old ITR forms use karke file kiye jayenge. Non-audit cases ke liye due date July 31, 2026 ya August 31, 2026 hai.
    *   **Tax Year 2026-27 (income of FY 2026-27):** Iski returns July 2027 tak due nahi hain. Lekin, taxpayers ko April 2026 se naye Act framework ke under income, TDS, aur advance tax payments track karna chahiye.
*   **Tax Audit Report for FY 2025-26 (AY 2026-27):** Ye Income Tax Act, 1961 se govern hoga. Forms (Form 3CA/3CB/3CD) mein hi file karna hoga, bhale hi filing April 1, 2026 ke baad ho. Due dates hain September 30, 2026, ya October 31, 2026, depending on the case.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/income-tax-act-2025)

*Published on: 25 May 2026*
